intent: A visitor on a phone needs to find the site owner's contact information (email, phone, or address) as fast as possible. They are not interested in the full site — they just need to reach someone.
notes: Template P5-3 — hard cap on patience. Mobile users looking for contact info bail fast. If this takes more than 4 clicks you have a usability problem. Runner should use mobile viewport (375×812) when it lands.
